---
name: "📝 Documentation Improvement"
about: Report missing, incorrect, or outdated documentation
labels: ["documentation", "needs-triage"]
assignees: artcava
---

## What is wrong or missing?

Describe the documentation problem. Include the file/section/URL if applicable.

## Suggested Improvement

How should the documentation be updated? Paste a draft or describe the change.

## Additional Context

Why is this documentation important? Who would benefit from the improvement?
